replies.msg:
Are you an individual with high client servicing standards? Are you a person who enjoys interactions with clients?

We’re looking for someone like that to:

• Be part of the front line client service team providing unparalleled service to our clients and client advisors
• Offer sound advice and provide strong support via helpline, ticketing system and emails
• Understand our clients and client advisors needs and communicate effectively with them and their supporting teams
• Demonstrate sensitivity and keen understanding of data confidentiality and client privacy
• Further develop core processes to improve service quality and efficiency
Your team
You will be working in the Digital Banking Client Servicing team covering APAC region. Our role is to be the first point of contact for our clients and client advisors regarding digital services related queries, issues and requests.
Examples of queries include login assistance, forms documentation, platform navigation, digital products, technical issues etc.

By improving the self-help information and working closely with various teams across the organization, we ensure operations fully support our Wealth Management business which manage, preserve and grow the wealth of our clients.

Providing an excellent & outstanding client experience is our goal.
Your expertise
• Diploma/Degree in any discipline with minimum 2 to 3 years of relevant work experience in a call centre / banking environment
• Strong client service mindset with excellent communication and problem solving skills
• Knowledge in trading and investments (preferably) a self-starter who can work well with minimal supervision
• a good communicator
• a person with high service level standards
• an effective team player, with professional and positive attitude
• able to converse fluently in English, Mandarin and Cantonese due to the geographical coverage of this role
• able to perform rotating shift, including Saturdays and public holidays
• able to work under pressure to strict deadlines (you're good at prioritizing tasks)
• adept at improving processes and enhancing workflows (you’re a keen observer and problem solver)
• innovative with data and agile in the changing landscape
